--- with_star.sql
GRAPH FinGraph
LET x = 1
WITH *
RETURN *

--- AST
&ast.GQLGraphQuery{
  GraphClause: &ast.GQLGraphClause{
    PropertyGraphName: &ast.Path{
      Idents: []*ast.Ident{
        &ast.Ident{
          NamePos: 6,
          NameEnd: 14,
          Name:    "FinGraph",
        },
      },
    },
  },
  Query: &ast.GQLMultiLinearQueryStatement{
    Statements: []ast.GQLLinearQueryStatement{
      &ast.GQLSimpleLinearQueryStatement{
        Statements: []ast.GQLPrimitiveQueryStatement{
          &ast.GQLLet{
            Let:   15,
            Items: []*ast.GQLLetItem{
              &ast.GQLLetItem{
                Ident: &ast.Ident{
                  NamePos: 19,
                  NameEnd: 20,
                  Name:    "x",
                },
                Expr: &ast.IntLiteral{
                  ValuePos: 23,
                  ValueEnd: 24,
                  Base:     10,
                  Value:    "1",
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLWith{
            With:  25,
            Items: []*ast.GQLReturnItem{
              &ast.GQLReturnItem{
                Star: 30,
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLReturn{
            Return: 32,
            Items:  []*ast.GQLReturnItem{
              &ast.GQLReturnItem{
                Star: 39,
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
GRAPH FinGraph LET x = 1 WITH * RETURN *
